description: Update a specified Requisition (Subcontractor Invoice). Users without admin permissions can only update a requisition (sub invoice) if it is the most recent and has a status of 'draft' or 'revise_and_resubmit'. Users with admin permissions can update a requisition (sub invoice) regardless of its status or whether it is the most recent. Requisition items are optional.

parameters.name: view
parameters.description: Specifies which view (which attributes) of the resource is going to be present in the response.

previous_requisition_id.description: ID for the previous requisition before this one on the same contract

deletable.description: A boolean indicating whether or not the invoice can be deleted.

final.description: true or false value indicating whether or not this is the final invoice

total_claimed_amount.description: Total Claimed Amount for the Invoice

move_materials_to_previous_work_complete.description: A boolean indicating if should move materials to previous work completed.

to_general_contractor.description: Name of the company the requisition is for

subcontractor_name.description: Name of the company the requisition is from

subcontractor_street.description: Street address of the company the requisition is from

subcontractor_city.description: City of the company the requisition is from

subcontractor_state_code.description: State code of the company the requisition is from

subcontractor_zip.description: Zip code of the company the requisition is from

subcontractor_country_code.description: Country code of the company the requisition is from

contract_date.description: Date the signed contract is received

negative_new_change_order_item_total.description: Negative new change order item total

negative_previous_change_order_item_tota.description: Negative previous change order item total

positive_new_change_order_item_total.description: Positive new change order item total

positive_previous_change_order_item_tota.description: Positive previous change order item total

total_completed_and_stored_to_date.description: Total completed and stored to date

new_materials.description: Amount of new materials added this period

new_materials_quantity.description: Quantity of new materials added this period, only for unit based line items

stored_materials.description: Amount of materials presently stored less the new materials added this period

stored_materials_quantity.description: Quantity of materials presently stored less the new materials added this period

company_name.description: User Company name. If the user belongs to a vendor, the vendor name will be returned.

data_type.description: Data type of the Custom Field Definition

value.description: The value of the custom field

data_type.description: Data type of the Custom Field Definition

value.description: The value of the custom field

data_type.description: Data type of the Custom Field Definition

value.description: The value of the custom field

data_type.description: Data type of the Custom Field Definition
Data type of the Custom Field Definition

currency_exchange_rate.description: The exchange rate between the invoice currency and the project currency

items.description: Requisition items. Included only when the views query param includes 'extended' or 'items'.

id.description: ID of the Contract Item or Contract Detail Item or Change Order Item or Whole Change Order Item

work_completed_from_previous_application.description: Work completed from previous application amount

materials_presently_stored_quantity.description: Quantity of the Materials presently stored, only for unit based line items

materials_presently_stored_from_previous.description: Materials presently stored from previous progress

materials_previously_stored_quantity.description: Quantity of the Materials stored from the previous invoice, only for unit based line items

materials_moved.description: Materials automatically moved from previous line item into previous work completed. This will be non-zero only if move_materials_to_previous_work_completed is true on the payment application.

materials_retainage_retained_moved.description: Retainage on materials automatically moved from previous line item into work completed retainage amount accrued previously. This will be non-zero only if move_materials_to_previous_work_completed i...

total_completed_and_stored_to_date.description: Total completed and stored to date amount

total_completed_and_stored_to_date_perce.description: Total completed and stored to date percent

total_completed_and_stored_to_date_from_.description: Total completed and stored to date from previous

work_completed_retainage_from_previous_a.description: Work completed retainage amount from previous application

work_completed_retainage_retained_this_p.description: Work completed retainage amount retained this period

work_completed_retainage_percent_this_pe.description: Work completed retainage percent this period

materials_stored_retainage_currently_ret.description: Materials stored retainage amount currently retained

materials_stored_retainage_percent_this_.description: Materials stored retainage percent this period, present

materials_stored_retainage_new_materials.description: Materials stored retainage from new materials, present

work_completed_retainage_released_this_p.description: Work completed retainage amount released this period

materials_stored_retainage_released_this.description: Materials stored retainage amount released this period

work_completed_from_previous_application.description: Work completed from previous application quantity

previous_progress_id.description: ID of the previous progress for the item

taxes.description: Tax code information associated with the item

uom.description: Unit of measure for this line item

item_packages.description: Requisition item packages. An item package can have either a contract or change order as its parent entity. Included only when the views query param includes 'extended' or 'items'.

contract_id.description: ID of the contract associated with the item package

change_order_id.description: ID of the change order associated with the item package

number.description: number associated with the item package's parent entity

title.description: title associated with the item package's parent entity

status.description: status associated with the item package's parent entity

position.description: position associated with the item package's parent entity

change_order_acronym_number.description: acronym for the change order object associated with the item package. Null if the item package's parent entity is a contract.

change_order_request.description: The change order request an item package is associated with. Only returned on three tier projects.

batch.description: The change order batch an item package is associated with. Only returned on multi tier projects.

final.description: true or false value indicating whether or not this is the final invoice

status.description: Status; admin can set any status, standard and billing recipient can set to under_review (submit) or draft (save)

prostore_file_ids.description: An array of Prostore File IDs. The Prostore Files will be associated with the Requisition (Subcontractor Invoice) as attachments.

upload_ids.description: An array of Upload UUIDs. The Uploads will be associated with the Requisition (Subcontractor Invoice) as attachments.

custom_field_%{custom_field_definition_i.description:
Value of the custom field. The data type of the value passed in corresponds with the data_type of the Custom Field Definition.
For a lov_entry data_type the value passed in should be the ID of one ...
